subject: Lease Renewal Offer — Action Required by April 15
body:
Your lease at 789 Pine St expires June 30, 2026.
We are pleased to offer you a renewal:

Option A: 12-month lease at $2,550/month (+$100)
Option B: 6-month lease at $2,650/month (+$200)
Option C: Month-to-month at $2,750/month (+$300)

Please respond by April 15, 2026.

subject: Renter's Insurance Renewal — Due April 1
body:
Your renter's insurance policy #RF-123456 renews on April 1, 2026.
Annual premium: $180.00 ($15/month)
Coverage: $50,000 personal property, $100,000 liability
Auto-renew is ON. No action needed if you wish to continue.
